title: Blizz Finance, Venus Protocol - REKT
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation leading to flash loan exploitation on lending protocols

prevention.rule: Block any tx that borrows funds with LUNA collateral when LUNA price is significantly below historical average

red_flags: Large quantities of LUNA bought as collateral
monitoring_rules: Monitor LUNA price and block suspicious borrowing activities
summary: Both Venus Protocol on BSC and Blizz Finance on Avalanche were drained due to inaccurate Chainlink price feeds, allowing users to borrow against overpriced LUNA collateral. A guard could have detected and blocked suspicious borrowing activities when LUNA prices fell significantly below historical averages.
